mapper.select: SELECT id, from_user_id, target_id, type, content, images, status, handle_result, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND from_user_id = #{complainantId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, from_user_id, target_id, type, content, images, status, handle_result, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND target_id = #{respondentId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, from_user_id, target_id, type, content, images, status, handle_result, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, from_user_id, target_id, type, content, images, status, handle_result, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT id, from_user_id, target_id, type, content, images, status, handle_result, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN (2, 3) ORDER BY update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status IN (2, 3)
SELECT id, from_user_id, target_id, type, content, images, status, handle_result, create_time, update_time, is_deleted FROM biz_complaint WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id = #{id}
